templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content:
We offer our 15% off entire purchase including sale items Military discount to all Active Duty, Reservist/National Guard, Veterans, and registered dependents: https://www.michaels.com/military-discount 

We offer our 10% off entire purchase including sale items Senior discount to anyone 55 years or older: https://www.michaels.com/senior-discount

We offer our 15% off entire purchase including sale items Teacher discount to all teachers, staff, and faculty Pre-K through Post-Grad. Also, Eligible: teachers who work in daycare centers, early childhood learning centers, home schools, instructors/teachers of after school programs, Boys & Girls Clubs etc: https://www.michaels.com/teacher-discount

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.michaels.com/rewards

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: From a standard product page, if the item is also available through MichaelsPro, you will see the option in the bottom right corner that says: 'Need a large quantity? Check out this bulk option.' You can also visit the MichaelsPro tab in the header of the website to view all available bulk options! https://www.michaels.com/shop/michaelspro-buy-in-bulk

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to call us at Call us at 1-800-MICHAELS

templates.name: Restock/Do you offer rain checks for items that are out of stock?
templates.content: Unfortunately, We do not offer rain checks on items that are out of stock. Please note, online inventory typically will replenish within 1-3 weeks (this excludes seasonal and clearance items).

templates.name: Where can I find your current coupons?
templates.content: You may see all available coupons here https://www.michaels.com/coupons

templates.name: Can I use more than one promo code towards my online order?
templates.content: Yes! You can use more than one promotion per order, however, only one promo code can be applied towards any one item; promos cannot be stacked. View our full Coupon Policy here: https://www.michaels.com/coupon-policy-and-price-guarantee

templates.name: How do I request a custom framing estimate?
templates.content: Custom framing costs are dependent on selection specifics for each order and current promotions. Please visit your nearest store to get a price estimate! You can also have your piece framed online. Check out this link for more framing details: https://www.michaelscustomframing.com/how-it-works.html?lang=en_US

templates.name: Can I cancel my curbside pickup order?
templates.content: Items purchased online for curbside pickup can be cancelled through Track Your Order. Please Note: Mixed orders that contain both store pickup and ship to home items can only be cancelled within the first 5-15 minutes. After this time, the order must be canceled through Customer Care. We are only able to cancel the store pickup items and the ship to home portion of the order will process.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact our Customer Care team at 1-800-MICHAELS or connect with us online at https://www.michaels.com/customer-care Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.michaels.com/track-my-order

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Normal order processing can take between 1-3 business days (Monday - Friday). We have following shipping methods available: Standard Ground (3 - 5 business days), Second Day (2 business days), Next Day (1 business day) and Same Day (same day). Business days do not include weekends and there is no weekend delivery for any shipping method except Same Day. Some items cannot be shipped using Second Day, Next Day or Same Day due to size, weight, hazardous materials and delivery address. These items will only have Standard Ground available. Currently, we do not ship to U.S. Territories, APO/FPO, Canada or other international addresses. Please note that orders could arrive in multiple packages. You can check our full shipping policy here: https://www.michaels.com/shipping-policy

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content:
If your Michaels.com purchase does not meet your satisfaction, you may return it within two months (60 days) of purchase, except for online-only costumes and accessory kits, which must be returned 7 days prior to the holiday. 
To return an item, the item must be new, unused, and in its original packaging. You may return your order to any Michaels store or request a return through your online account. You can also check out our full return policy and steps to return your items here: https://www.michaels.com/return-policy

templates.name: Can I change the shipping location on my order?
templates.content: No. We are not able to edit the shipping address on completed orders.

templates.name: How do I cancel an in store event?
templates.content: Cancellation is not necessary for any in store events. You can sign up to receive an email and/or text reminder for any upcoming event.

templates.name: How do I cancel a party?
templates.content: You can view our full cancellation policy here: https://www.michaels.com/customer-care/classes-events-and-parties/cancelation-policy

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/michaelsstores/# and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/Michaels

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://www.michaels.com/protection-plans

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/michaelsstores/# and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/Michaels

templates.name: Do you refund shipping charges for returns?
templates.content: We offer refunds on shipping charges for damaged or lost shipments. You may start your return in your Order History page. If you have not yet created an account, you can track your order on the Track My Order page, create your new account, and then start your return. View our full Return Policy.

templates.name: Why was my order canceled?
templates.content: Orders may be cancelled due to product availability or because we are unable to successfully process the payment. For store pickup or curbside orders, the order may also be cancelled if it isn't picked up within 5 business days.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free Standard Ground: (3 - 5 Business Days) shipping on orders over $49.99

templates.name: How do I cancel a free online class?
templates.content: No cancellation is required for free online classes. There are no refunds where no purchases were made. All free classes are recorded and made available the next business day on the Michaels.com/classes.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-800-MICHAELS or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: I'm happy to help you locate a store near you. Can you provide me with your zip code? You can also find us at a store near you here: https://www.michaels.com/store-locator
